knowledge_base.answer:
👋 **Karibu Unasemeje Support!**
I'm your AI Assistant. I can help you with:

• 🚀 **How to place an order**
• 💰 **Adding funds & checking balance**
• 📦 **Tracking your orders**
• 🎁 **Referral bonuses**
• 🛠️ **Troubleshooting issues**

Just type your question below, or use the Quick Actions on the left!

🛒 **We offer hundreds of premium, high-quality services across all major social platforms!**

I can pull up some live examples for you right now. Here is what's trending:

🚀 **Placing an order is super easy!**
1️⃣ Go to **New Order**.
2️⃣ Pick your **Category** (IG, TikTok, etc.).
3️⃣ Select the **Service** you want.
4️⃣ Paste your **Profile or Post Link**.
5️⃣ Enter **Quantity** and hit **CONFIRM BOOST**!

💡 *Pro Tip: Make sure your account is PUBLIC before ordering followers or views!*

💰 **To add funds to your wallet:**
1️⃣ Go to the **Add Funds** page.
2️⃣ Ensure your **M-Pesa Payment Nodes** are saved in your profile!
3️⃣ Enter the amount in the Paynecta checkout portal.
4️⃣ Complete the M-Pesa prompt.

⚡ *Deposits are auto-verified instantly! We accept M-Pesa and other mobile money methods via the secure Paynecta portal.*

💰 **Your current wallet balance is KES {balance}.**

Got some loose change? Top up via the **Add Funds** page and keep the aura boosting! 🚀

📦 **You currently have {active_orders} active order(s) processing!**

Most orders start within 0-5 minutes. You can track their live status on the **My Orders** page. If one gets stuck, our system auto-refunds or retries automatically!

🚨 **Did you send money but it is not in your wallet?**

Please send me the **exact phone number** you used to send the money (for example: 0712345678).

I will check our system to see if the payment is there and add it to your account immediately! 🛠️

🔒 **To change your password:**
Scroll down on the **Add Funds** or **Dashboard** page to the **'Modify Security Gateway'** section. Enter your current password and set a new one. Stay secure, boss! 🛡️

📱 **To update your M-Pesa numbers:**
Go to **Add Funds** -> **'Modify Account Profile'**. You can add up to 2 Alternative Funding Nodes. 

⚠️ *IMPORTANT: You MUST click 'Save Profile Changes' BEFORE making a deposit, or the system won't recognize your payment!*

💵 **Our Pricing:**
All services are priced **per 1,000 (1k)**. 

For example, if a service says **KES 50/1k**, and you order **2,000 followers**, it will cost you **KES 100**!

💡 *Check the 'Services' page to see the exact rate for every platform!*

🎁 **The Unasemeje Referral Plug!**
Share your unique referral code with your squad. Every time they buy a service, **YOU get a 10% commission** in your wallet!

💸 *Passive income kwa mtandao! Check your code on the **Referrals** page.*

💬 **Ordering Custom Comments:**
1️⃣ Select a 'Custom Comments' service in **New Order**.
2️⃣ A text box will appear instead of the quantity box.
3️⃣ Type your comments (**one per line**).
4️⃣ The system automatically counts them and calculates the price!

🔥 *You are the director!*

⏳ **Order stuck on 'Pending'?**
Don't panic! Sometimes the provider's server is updating. 

1️⃣ Wait 15-30 minutes.
2️⃣ If it still hasn't started, go to **My Orders** and click 'Sync Status'.
3️⃣ If it failed, the money is **auto-refunded** to your wallet! ✅

🔗 **Link Rules (Very Important!):**
• **Followers/Profile Views:** Paste your PROFILE link (e.g., instagram.com/username).
• **Likes/Views/Comments:** Paste the specific POST link.
• ⚠️ **Your profile MUST be PUBLIC!** Private accounts cannot receive followers or views, and the order will fail.

❌ **Can I cancel an order?**
Once an order is placed, it's sent to the provider instantly and **cannot be cancelled**.

However, if the order fails or remains incomplete, the system will **automatically refund** the money back to your wallet! 💸

🛡️ **Is it safe? Will I get banned?**
100% Safe! We use premium, high-retention methods that mimic organic growth. 

• No passwords required (Never share your password!).
• Safe for all accounts.
• If an order drops, many of our premium services come with a **30-day refill guarantee**! 🔄
😊 Hello! I am here to help you with deposits, orders, services, balance checks, profile updates, and account support. How can I help you today?

📲 **It looks like you sent money from a different number.**

Please send me the **exact phone number** you used to make the payment.

I will check if a completed payment exists and add it to your wallet immediately! ✅

📱 Please send the phone number you would like to register.

Once verified, I will save it to your account for future deposits.

👤 I can help update your account details.

Please tell me what you want to change (name, username, email, or phone number) and I will save the changes for you.

🔥 Here are some affordable services under KES 100 currently available:

🔹 Facebook Followers: KES 45 for 1,000
🔹 Facebook Page Likes: KES 60 for 1,000
🔹 Instagram Likes: KES 30 for 1,000
🔹 TikTok Followers: KES 85 for 1,000
🔹 YouTube Views: KES 90 for 1,000

🚀 Go to New Order and choose these services to save money!

fetch_cheap_services.description: Return services costing KES 100 or less
fetch_cheap_services.query: SELECT * FROM services WHERE price <= 100 ORDER BY price ASC LIMIT 20

ask_for_payment_phone.description: Ask the user for the phone number used to make the payment

check_and_credit_payment.description: Check if a completed payment exists for the given phone number. If yes, credit the user's wallet immediately. If no, return not found.
check_and_credit_payment.query: SELECT * FROM payments WHERE phone = ? AND status = 'completed' AND credited = false ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

save_phone_number.description: Save funding number to user profile

ai_rules: When user says hello, reply: 'Hello 👋 How can I help you today?'
When user says hi, reply: 'Hi 👋 Welcome to Unasemeje.'
When user says good morning, reply: '🌞 Good morning! How can I assist you today?'
When user says good afternoon, reply: '☀️ Good afternoon! How can I help?'
When user says good evening, reply: '🌙 Good evening! Need any assistance?'
When user says good night, reply: '🌙 Good night and thank you for using Unasemeje.'
When user says thanks or thank you, reply: '😊 You are welcome!'
When user says okay or ok, reply: '👍 Great! Let me know if you need anything else.'
When user says bye or goodbye, reply: '👋 Goodbye and have a great day!'
When user asks for Facebook services, show Facebook services costing less than KES 100 first.
When user asks for Instagram services, show Instagram services costing less than KES 100 first.
When user asks for TikTok services, show TikTok services costing less than KES 100 first.
When user says their payment was not credited or they used another number, ask for the phone number used.

Always remember the previous conversation context. If you asked the user for a phone number because their payment was not credited, and they reply with a phone number, immediately check that number in the system using the 'check_and_credit_payment' action.

If a completed payment is found from that number but not yet credited, credit it to the user's wallet immediately and reply: '✅ Great news! I found your payment from that number and have added the money to your wallet immediately.'

If no completed payment is found from that number, reply: '❌ Sorry, we cannot find any completed payment from that number in our system. Please contact WhatsApp Support with your M-Pesa message for help.'
Allow users to register funding numbers.
Allow users to update names, usernames, emails and funding numbers.
Maintain a smooth, natural, and friendly conversation flow. Always connect your answers to what the user just said and remember what you talked about previously.
Always use simple English.
Never expose database information.
Always be polite and helpful.
